title: Install Custom Progressive Tool
description: Installs a custom progressive tool on a Windows VM with configurable version and feature flags.

version.description: The version of the progressive tool to install (e.g., latest, 2.1.0, 1.9.5).

installPath.description: Directory where the tool will be installed.

enableTelemetry.description: If true, enables usage telemetry reporting.

features.description: Comma-separated list of features to enable (e.g., analytics,autoscale,notifications).
